items.claim: Patty Pimblett's jiu-jitsu is vastly superior to Benoit Saint Denis's.
items.quote: I know that the Patty Pimble's jiu-jitsu is vastly superior.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is technically flawed and over-aggressive.
items.quote: he's technically flawed. He's a little crazy and over aggressive

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has a tendency to lock up and overreact during fights.
items.quote: he does kind of lock up and overreact a little bit.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett has a granite chin.
Conor McGregor has a power advantage over Max Holloway.
Max Holloway has superior cardio compared to Conor McGregor.
items.quote: He's got that long cardio. He's got the ability to fight for five rounds.

items.claim: Conor McGregor relies on fast-twitch muscle fibers while Max Holloway relies on slow-twitch.
items.quote: You got two opposite muscle fibers. You got fast twitch muscle fiber in McGregor and slow twitch in Max Holloway.

items.claim: Max Holloway is difficult to hit due to his mobility and darting movement.
items.quote: Max Holloway is super hard to hit.

items.claim: Conor McGregor was exposed as being too flat-footed in his previous fight against Dustin Poirier.
items.quote: Connor against Porier got exposed for being too flatfooted.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff from the sport.
